hero.headline:
Your Business Knows
More Than Any Manual Covers
hero.subheadline: Reduce safety incidents by giving every apprentice instant access to procedures, regulations, and decades of hard-won expertise — even by voice, on the workshop floor.

stats.searchTimeLabel: of working time spent searching for technical information
stats.knowledgeLossLabel: of technical knowledge lost when a master technician retires
stats.trainingCostLabel: average cost of onboarding a single apprentice

socialProof.description: We built PremiumBrain for businesses where knowledge is critical. Trades companies use it to preserve decades of expertise and make it instantly accessible — even by voice, on the workshop floor.
